title: Termination
doc_html:
§979.6.  Termination

Annually during each regular session of the legislature, the legislature shall have the authority to decide whether to continue the program.

Acts 2014, No. 783, §1, eff. June 19, 2014.
doc_text:
§979.6.  Termination
Annually during each regular session of the legislature, the legislature shall have the authority to decide whether to continue the program.
Acts 2014, No. 783, §1, eff. June 19, 2014.
